title: trisetaria alpestris
intro: Trisetaria alpestris, also known as Alpine Brome or Alpine Brome Grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and tissues. The health benefits of Trisetaria alpestris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Trisetaria alpestris is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
